name: Morgan Stanley
description: Morgan Stanley ecosystem — suppliers, customers, partners, holdings, and regulators.

nodes.name: Morgan Stanley
nodes.relationship: Your stock

nodes.name: Microsoft Corporation
nodes.relationship: Strategic enterprise software and cloud infrastructure supplier

nodes.name: Bloomberg L.P.
nodes.relationship: Primary market data terminal and financial information supplier

nodes.name: BlackRock, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Provider of Aladdin investment management and risk analytics platforms

nodes.name: Salesforce, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Enterprise CRM and wealth management cloud software supplier

nodes.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Cloud infrastructure and computing services supplier via AWS

nodes.name: U.S. Department of the Treasury
nodes.relationship: Designated primary dealer for U.S. Treasury securities, purchasing directly at government auctions.

nodes.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Lead underwriter for the 2012 IPO and subsequent capital markets transactions.

nodes.name: Verizon Communications Inc.
nodes.relationship: Lead bookrunner for the record $49 billion bond offering to fund the Vodafone wireless acquisition.

nodes.name: Saudi Aramco
nodes.relationship: Joint global coordinator and bookrunner for the 2019 IPO, the largest in history.

nodes.name: Tesla, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Lead underwriter for multiple equity and convertible debt offerings since 2010.

nodes.name: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group
nodes.relationship: Major shareholder and joint-venture partner for Morgan Stanley MUFG Securities in Japan.

nodes.name: Microsoft
nodes.relationship: Strategic cloud partnership leveraging Azure for digital transformation and infrastructure modernization.

nodes.name: Broadridge Financial Solutions
nodes.relationship: Strategic wealth management technology partner providing platform and outsourcing solutions.

nodes.name: American Express
nodes.relationship: Co-branded credit card partnership including the Platinum Card for Morgan Stanley clients.

nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.relationship: Strategic AI collaboration deploying GPT-4 to power the Morgan Stanley wealth management assistant.

nodes.name: E*TRADE Financial Corporation
nodes.relationship: Wholly owned retail brokerage subsidiary acquired in 2020

nodes.name: Eaton Vance Corp.
nodes.relationship: Wholly owned asset management subsidiary acquired in 2021

nodes.name: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group
nodes.relationship: Strategic shareholder and banking alliance partner since 2008

nodes.name: Solium Capital
nodes.relationship: Wholly owned equity compensation platform acquired in 2019 operating as Shareworks

nodes.name: U.S. Department of the Treasury
nodes.relationship: Primary dealer for U.S. government securities and participant in federal financial stabilization programs.

nodes.name: Federal Reserve System
nodes.relationship: Primary federal banking regulator overseeing the firm as a bank holding company and subject to supervisory stress testing.

nodes.name: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
nodes.relationship: Primary regulator of its securities underwriting, broker-dealer, and investment advisory operations.

nodes.name: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation
nodes.relationship: Deposit insurer and resolution planning authority for Morgan Stanley's FDIC-insured banking subsidiaries.

nodes.name: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
nodes.relationship: Chartering authority and primary regulator for its national bank subsidiary, Morgan Stanley Bank, N.A.
